## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- **Rust Version:** [e.g., 1.75.0]
- **Feature Flags:** [e.g., v1.8-sprint2, stable]
- **Beta Version:** v1.8.0-beta.1

## Severity

- [ ] **P0** — Critical (data loss, security, complete crash)
- [ ] **P1** — High (major feature broken, no workaround)
- [ ] **P2** — Medium (feature degraded, workaround exists)
- [ ] **P3** — Low (minor issue, cosmetic)

## Module Affected

- [ ] API Explorer
- [ ] Reputation Proof Schema
- [ ] Geographic Routing
- [ ] WASM Mobile Bridge
- [ ] Async Steering
- [ ] QuantConfig
- [ ] P2P Swarm
- [ ] Other: _______
